description_long: This object is a handheld audio recorder, specifically the Zoom H4n Pro, designed for high-quality field recording. The device features a robust black and silver plastic and metal body with a prominent LCD display on the front, surrounded by an array of physical buttons for navigation and control. At the top, two X/Y stereo condenser microphones are mounted in a protective metallic frame, angled for optimal stereo capture. The sides of the device are equipped with various input/output ports, including XLR/TRS combo jacks, USB, and SD card slots, as well as volume and menu controls. The back panel displays regulatory information, branding, and a battery compartment. Its compact, rugged design makes it suitable for portable use in urban environments, such as interviews, street performances, or ambient sound recording.
description: A compact, handheld audio recorder with a black and silver body, LCD display, physical buttons, and dual X/Y microphones on top. Designed for portable, high-quality field recording.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LCD display, control buttons, and the dual X/Y microphones at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting input/output ports, including XLR/TRS combo jacks and control switches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying branding, regulatory markings, and the battery compartment cover.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional ports, SD card slot, and volume/menu controls.
